statement: A directed sequence of nonnegative augmented repaired forms whose closed lower-semicontinuous transport limit is identified by the Mosco/quotient theorem has a nonnegative completed repaired form.

finiteRepairedSequenceInputStatus.label: finite repaired sequence input
finiteRepairedSequenceInputStatus.reason: Every finite repaired form in the directed core sequence is nonnegative.

closedFormLscInputStatus.label: closed lower-semicontinuity input
closedFormLscInputStatus.reason: The closed-form LSC theorem identifies the completed transport limit.

nonnegativeClosedFormLimitStatus.label: nonnegative closed-form limit
nonnegativeClosedFormLimitStatus.reason: Lower semicontinuity prevents a negative vector in the completed form domain from being approximated by nonnegative finite repaired forms.

proof: Assume a completed-domain vector had negative repaired-form value.
Use the closed-form LSC transport theorem to choose core recovery sequences with the same closed envelope.
The finite repaired forms are nonnegative on the recovery sequence.
Lower semicontinuity contradicts the negative completed value.
